title: Wuhan, Hubei — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wuhan, Hubei: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wuhan is a city in Hubei with a population of 12,327,000. A major transportation hub in central China, known for its Yangtze River crossings, university district, and emerging semiconductor industry.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
